functions.name: addGarnet
functions.description: Adds a Garnet container resource to the application model.
functions.signature: addGarnet(name: string, port?: number, password?: ParameterResource): GarnetResource

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Garnet server.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: passwordParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the Garnet server password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the Garnet server.

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the Garnet server.
functions.remarks: Format: `redis://[:{password}@]{host}:{port}`. The password segment is omitted when no password is configured.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Garnet container resource and enables Garnet persistence.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount. Setting this to `true` will disable Garnet persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Garnet container resource and enables Garnet persistence.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume. Setting this to `true` will disable Garnet persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withPersistence
functions.description: Configures a Garnet container resource for persistence.
functions.remarks:
Use with `WithDataBindMount`
or `WithDataVolume` to persist Garnet data across sessions with custom persistence configuration, e.g.:
```
var cache = builder.AddGarnet("cache")
.WithDataVolume()
.WithPersistence(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10));
```

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The interval between snapshot exports. Defaults to 60 seconds.

handleTypes.name: GarnetResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a Garnet resource independent of the hosting model.
